executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Execute the following 3 penetration scenarios and generate a report:
1. Skenario A (Webhook Forgery): Test /api/webhook/mayar with a fake payload and no Signature Header. Expect the API to reject with HTTP 400 or 401.
2. Skenario B (Privilege Escalation): Attempt to access PATCH /api/admin/role-request using a student's JWT token. Verify that Custom Claims block this with HTTP 403.
3. Skenario C (Stress Test Fallback): Call /api/auth/sync 50 times in 1 second to test the application's bootstrap robustness.
